The project output type needs to be `Exe` instead of a library, and `[Fact]` and `[Theory]` attributes continue to work from the `Xunit` namespace. I should verify whether `Xunit.Combinatorial` has a v3-compatible version.

For the migration itself, I need to add `<OutputType>Exe</OutputType>` to the project file and reference `xunit.v3` directly. The test project becomes an executable rather than a library. I'm checking the current package versions for `Xunit.Combinatorial` and `Xunit.StaFact` to see which versions support v3, then I'll replace the base `xunit` package with `xunit.v3`.
